text: Dear Janitorial Team, I am reaching out regarding my recent visit to one of your serviced restrooms at XYZ Corporation's headquarters on Elm Street. Upon entering today around noon, both stalls were uncomfortably dirty; there appeared to have been little effort made between cleanings as evidenced by lingering odors emanating strongly within each stall area. This level of cleanliness does not meet even basic hygiene standards expected under normal circumstances nor aligns with what I've come to expect based upon prior experiences during earlier visits throughout March.
